    Description
    CategoryDto
    Data Transfer Object representing a category without exposing internal entity details.
    CreateCategoryDto
    DTO used for creating or updating a category.
    CreateTransactionDto
    DTO used for creating or updating a transaction.
    TransactionDto
    Data Transfer Object representing a transaction with category information.
    UserDto
    Data Transfer Object representing a simplified view of a User.
    UserFinancialStateDto
    DTO representing the complete financial state of a user.
